metadata.source: BLS Standard Occupational Classification (SOC) — tech-aligned subset
metadata.note: Salary ranges and demand indicators are enriched from Lightcast at script run time when LIGHTCAST_CLIENT_ID/SECRET are set. SOC codes are stable; titles match common industry usage.

roles.title: Frontend Software Engineer
roles.description: Builds user-facing web applications. Owns the experience users actually touch.

roles.title: Backend Software Engineer
roles.description: Designs and operates the systems behind the UI — APIs, databases, service logic.
stack: One backend language (Python, Go, Java, or Node)

roles.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
roles.description: Owns features end-to-end across UI, API, and data.

roles.title: iOS Engineer
roles.description: Builds native applications for iPhone and iPad.

roles.title: Android Engineer
roles.description: Builds native applications for Android devices.

roles.title: Embedded Software Engineer
roles.description: Writes software that runs on devices — vehicles, medical instruments, industrial control, defense systems.

roles.title: QA / Test Automation Engineer
roles.description: Builds the test infrastructure that catches regressions before users do.

roles.title: Game Developer
roles.description: Builds video games, simulations, or training environments.

roles.title: Site Reliability Engineer
roles.description: Keeps production systems up and fast. Lives at the intersection of code and operations.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.description: Owns the pipelines that get code from a developer's machine to production.

roles.title: Platform Engineer
roles.description: Builds the internal developer platform — the paved roads other engineers use.

roles.title: Cloud Engineer
roles.description: Designs and operates infrastructure on AWS, GCP, or Azure.

roles.title: Network Engineer
roles.description: Designs, deploys, and operates the networks that connect everything.

roles.title: Systems Administrator
roles.description: Runs the servers and services an organization depends on.

roles.title: Database Administrator / Engineer
roles.description: Owns database performance, reliability, and data integrity.
stack: One database in depth (Postgres, MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle)

roles.title: Data Engineer
roles.description: Builds the pipelines that move and transform data so analysts and ML can use it.

roles.title: Analytics Engineer
roles.description: The bridge between data engineering and analytics — owns the trusted models analysts query.

roles.title: Data Analyst
roles.description: Turns data into decisions. Builds dashboards, runs analyses, partners with stakeholders.
stack: One BI tool (Tableau, Power BI, Looker)

roles.title: Data Scientist
roles.description: Applies statistics and ML to answer business questions and ship predictive features.

roles.title: Machine Learning Engineer
roles.description: Productionizes ML models — training pipelines, serving infra, monitoring drift.
stack: ML pipeline tooling (MLflow, Kubeflow, Vertex AI)

roles.title: MLOps Engineer
roles.description: DevOps for ML — owns training pipelines, model registries, and production model reliability.

roles.title: Security Engineer
roles.description: Designs systems to be secure by default. Owns the security review for new architectures.

roles.title: SOC Analyst
roles.description: Front line of cyber defense — investigates alerts, triages incidents, writes detections.

roles.title: Penetration Tester
roles.description: Breaks systems on purpose so defenders can fix them.

roles.title: Governance, Risk & Compliance Analyst
roles.description: Owns the framework side of security — audits, control mapping, regulatory readiness.

roles.title: UX Designer / Researcher
roles.description: Decides what gets built and how it should feel for users.

roles.title: Technical Program Manager
roles.description: Drives multi-team technical initiatives. Translates strategy into execution.
stack: Software systems literacy (read code, read architecture diagrams)

roles.title: Engineering Manager
roles.description: Manages engineers — hiring, performance, technical direction, team health.

roles.title: Solutions Engineer
roles.description: Pre-sales technical role — proves the product works for the customer's actual problem.

roles.title: Developer Advocate / DevRel
roles.description: Bridges product and developer community — talks, content, feedback loops.

roles.title: Technical Writer
roles.description: Owns the docs developers and customers use. Documentation is the product surface.
stack: Software engineering literacy (read code, run examples)

roles.title: IT Support Specialist (Help Desk)
roles.description: Often the on-ramp into tech — supporting end users while building career-long systems intuition.

roles.title: Health IT Specialist
roles.description: Bridges clinical operations and IT — EHR systems, HL7/FHIR, healthcare compliance.

roles.title: Robotics / Autonomy Software Engineer
roles.description: Software for robots, drones, autonomous vehicles — perception, planning, control.

roles.title: Computer Systems Analyst
roles.description: Studies an organization's systems and processes, then designs improvements.
